source: Derived from Roland 'V31 Data List' (eng02), (c) Roland Corporation — facts (names/numbers) extracted by tools/parse_datalist.py.

remark_flags.M: supports Mic Size / Mic Distance editing (Mic Size: kick only)
remark_flags.P: positional sensing (strike position / rim depth changes the sound)
remark_flags.X: on a snare rim, pairs the matching cross-stick sound on XSTICK
